question_text: Which of the following best describes why fossil fuels are non-renewable?

options.label: B
options.text: They take millions of years to form and we use them faster than they can be replaced

options.label: D
options.text: They are only found in certain countries

explanation: Fossil fuels form over millions of years, but humans use them much faster than nature can replace them. Once burned, they are gone forever, which is why they are non-renewable. Pollution and location are separate issues.
